memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in the Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in the Brain architecture.
It is an open question whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is an open question which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain architecture.

details: Committed architecture principles for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack.
Committed open questions about Telegram and model choice.
